en: Today we are going to talk about 25 commonly mispronounced words in English language. Are
ko: 오늘은 영어에서 흔히 잘못 발음되는 단어 25개를 이야기할 거예요.

en: you ready to learn the correct pronunciations? Pronunciations. Not pronunciations. Pronunciations.
ko: 올바른 발음을 배울 준비되셨나요? Pronunciations. Pronunciations가 아니에요. Pronunciations.

en: Let's start. Acoustic. Acoustic. Not acoustic. Not acoustic. Acoustic. Acoustic guitar. Berry.
ko: 시작해 볼게요. Acoustic. Acoustic. Acoustic이 아니에요. Acoustic. Acoustic guitar. Berry.

en: Berry. Whether American or British, it's supposed to be berry. Though we've made place for
ko: Berry. 미국식이든 영국식이든 berry로 발음해야 해요. 인도식 발음으로 berry가 자리 잡긴 했지만

en: berry in Indian pronunciation, but it was always supposed to be berry. Cocoa. Very commonly
ko: 원래는 항상 berry였어요. Cocoa. 매우 흔히 잘못 발음되는 단어예요.

en: mispronounced. Cocoa. Cocoa. Not cocoaa. No, it's not cocoaa. It's cocoa. Cough. Not cough.
ko: Cocoa. Cocoa. Cocoaa가 아니에요. Cocoa. Cough. Cough가 아니에요. Cough. Cough. Coupon. Coupon. Coupon이 아니에요. Coupon. Determine. Determine이 아니에요. Determine. Determine.

en: Cough. Cough. Coupon. Coupon. Not coupon. Coupon. Determine. Not determine. Determine. Determine.
ko: Mine이 아니에요, min만. Delight. Elite. Elite. 고급스러운 게 아니에요. Elite. Gauge. Gauge가 아니에요. Gauge. Gauge.

en: No mine. Only min. Delight. Elite. Elite. No classy. Elite. Gauge. Not gauge. Gauge. Gauge.
ko: Engineer. Engineer가 아니에요. Engineer로 발음해야 해요. Engineer. Engineer. Government. Government.

en: Engineer. Not engineer. It's supposed to be engineer. Engineer. Engineer. Government. Government.
ko: R 발음이 없어요. R을 발음하지 않아요. Government가 아니에요. Government가 아니에요. Government.

en: There is no R. No pronunciation of R. It's not government. Not government. No. Government.
ko: Gyroscope. Gyroscope이 아니에요. Gyroscope. Gyroscope. Iron. Iron. 아니에요. Iron. R이 없어요. Iron. R이 묵음이에요.

en: Gyroscope. Not gyroscope. Gyroscope. Gyroscope. Iron. Iron. No. Iron. No R. Iron. R is silent.
ko: 왜 묵음인지 묻지 마세요. 저도 몰라요. 저한테도 말이 안 돼요. Legit. Legit.

en: Don't ask me why it is silent. I don't know. It makes no sense to me either. Legit. Legit. Not
ko: Buy가 아니에요. Merchandise. Mundane. Mundane이 아니에요. Mundane. Mundane. Mundane이 아니에요. Plateau. Plateau.

en: buy. Merchandise. Mundane. Not mundane. Mundane. Mundane. No mundane. Plateau. Plateau. Now I do
ko: 이 단어를 어떻게 잘못 발음하는지 모르겠지만 plateau로 발음해야 해요. Poem. Poem.

en: not know how you mispronounce this one but it's supposed to be plateau. Okay. Poem. Poem. Okay.
ko: 약간의 E가 있어요. Poem. Poem이 아니에요. Poem이 아니에요. Restaurant. Restaurant. 먹는 곳이요. Restaurant.

en: Slight E. Poem. Not poem. Not poem. Restaurant. Restaurant. The place where you eat. Restaurant.
ko: Restaurant가 아니에요. Restaurant. 원래 raw로 발음해야 해요. Raw. Restaurant.

en: Not a restaurant. Not a restaurant. Restaurant. So they're supposed to be raw. Raw. Restaurant.
ko: Thorough. Thorough. Through가 아니에요. Thorough. Thorough와 through는 차이가 있어요. 이건

en: Thorough. Thorough. Not through. Thorough. There's a difference between thorough and through. This is
ko: thorough예요. Wolf. Wolf. Wolf가 아니에요. Wolf. Worm. Worm이 아니에요. Worm. 간단하게. Worm.

en: thorough. Wolf. Wolf. Not wolf. Wolf. Worm. Not worm. No. No worm. Worm. Keep it simple. Worm.
ko: 그리고 마지막 몇 개. Steak. Steak. Steak이 아니에요. 매우 흔히 잘못 발음돼요. Steak.

en: And a few last ones on the list. Steak. Steak. Not steak. Very commonly mispronounced. Steak.
ko: 먹는 치킨 스테이크요. Vineyard. 또는 vineyard. 둘 다 괜찮아요. Vineyard.

en: The chicken steak that you eat. Some people do. Vineyard. Or vineyard. Both are okay. Vineyard.
ko: Vineyard. 하지만 vineyard는 아니에요. Womb. 이상하게도 B가 또 묵음이에요. Womb. B가 없어요.

en: Vineyard. But not vineyard. Womb. For some strange reason B is silent yet again. Womb. No B.
ko: Womb. 그리고 분명 womb이 아니에요. Womb이 아니에요. Womb. 어머니의 자궁, 그 womb이요.

en: Womb. And certainly not womb. No womb. Womb. Mother's womb. That womb I'm talking about.
ko: Hind. Hind. 영국식이든 미국식이든 Hind예요. 하지만 인도 사람들이 새로운

en: Hind. Hind. British or American. Both are Hind. But yes, Indians have come up with a new
ko: 발음 Hind를 만들긴 했어요. 하지만 Hind가 원래 발음이에요. 끝까지 시청해 주셔서

en: pronunciation which is Hind. But Hind was the original. Thank you very much for watching till
ko: 감사합니다. 댓글로 어떤 게 처음 알게 된 건지 알려주세요.

en: the end. Let me know in the comments which of these were brand new for you. I'll be back with
ko: 이런 영상 더 가져올게요. 그때까지 잘 지내세요. 안녕!

en: more of these. Till then you take care of yourself. Bye.
